summary_en: Howtelevision resolved to cancel 3,397 treasury shares effective May 29, 2026, reducing outstanding shares to 2,717,485.
title_en: Notice regarding cancellation of treasury shares
translation_en_brief: On May 18, 2026, Howtelevision Inc. (TSE Standard, code 7064) announced a board resolution to cancel 3,397 treasury shares in accordance with Article 178 of the Companies Act. The cancellation is scheduled to be executed on May 29, 2026. Following the cancellation, the company's issued share capital will total 2,717,485 shares, and the company will hold zero treasury shares.
